tasks.summary: checkReplyFollowThrough() implemented in dispatcher.js. Reads outgoing replies from posts log (type='reply'), cross-references engagement log (in_reply_to_our_post) to find which generated dialogue. Logs to workspace/logs/engagement/replies.json (idempotent, 200-entry cap). Injects compact morning wake context: N/M replies converted, X%. Test: 5 replies in last 24h, 0 follow-backs — matches today's retrospective. Commit: 78a65cf.
